allow: Bash(start "Backend API" cmd /k "cd backend && venv\Scripts\activate && python -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8000")
Bash("venv\Scripts\python.exe" -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0, ''.''); from skidl import schematic_generator; import importlib; importlib.reload(schematic_generator); print(''Module reloaded'')")

Bash("venv\Scripts\python.exe" -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0, ''.''); from schematic_gen.schematic_generator import generate_schematic; netlist=''* 555 Timer LED Blinker
V1 VCC 0 DC 9
R1 VCC 7 1k
R2 7 6 71.5k
C1 6 0 10u
C2 5 0 10n
R3 3 700 220
D1 700 0 LED
XU1 1 2 3 4 8 7 6 5 NE555
''; svg, summary = generate_schematic(netlist); print(''SVG length:'', len(svg)); print(''Has NE555:'', ''NE555'' in svg)")
